items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.8 mph at a 12.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Detroit Tigers, KC 4, DET 3. Kyle Isbel led the night, 2-4 | 2 RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.8 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Tigers Recap
